name: playstore_reviews
description: Fetch user reviews from Google Play. Returns review metadata including author, star rating, device info, and comment text. Note: Google Play only exposes production reviews with text from approximately the last week.

packageName.description: The Android package name of the app (e.g., com.example.myapp)

limit.description: Maximum number of reviews to return (default: 20, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response, to fetch the next page
